rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH MARIE BARNSON KARNAZES VS. ISERVE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 25, 2014 line 2. PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH KARNAZES' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition to request to withdraw filed. Plaintiff states that she has already prepared a substitution and substituted counsel out of her case. (Plaintiff's Amended Declaration paragraphs 66 and 74). No substitution on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMY HOWER et al VS. ADAM CLAMMER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 25, 2014 line 6. DEFENDANTS ADAM CLAMMER and KATE HARBIN's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: reckless disregard of plaintiffs' rights and safety. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMY HOWER et al VS. ADAM CLAMMER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 25, 2014 line 6. DEFENDANTS ADAM CLAMMER and KATE HARBIN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges all causes of action against all defendants and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOCHI TA VS. LOUIS KIRTMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 25, 2014 line 7. DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for breach of contract. Plaintiffs' failure to differentiate between Sochi Ta, an individual, and Sochi Ta, a trustee, renders the complaint uncertain. It is impossible to ascertain which Plaintiff entered into a contract with defendant and which Plaintiff, if any, currently has a contractual relationship with defendant as all allegations refer only to "TA." Demurer to the cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty is sustained without leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JULIE TISHKOFF VS. GLADYS ALVA et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 25, 2014 line 12. Defendant Edward Downing'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CESAR V. TIONGCO VS. FIUME DRUMMOND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 25, 2014 line 10. DEFENDANT FIUME DRUMMOND's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES GRANTED. Attorney's fees in the amount of $500 and costs in the amount of $225.Voluntary dismissal file one day before the hearing on unopposed demurrer to a fatally defective complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ASMIN BIBI VS. RICHARD HARRISON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 25, 2014 line 11. DEFENDANT MILENA LANGBAUM's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473.5., i.e. defendant does not address service attempts on 8/7-8/9 and service by mail on 8/10.Defnednt receives her mail as Request for Default was received by mail. (Defendant's Declaration, paragraph 3). Additionally, no proof of service re: Motion to Vacate on file. = (501/REQ)
